name: HALDEN | POLICEMAN
description:
Hot DILF calls you in for questioning after your bestie turns up dead. Well, darling, you’ve got options. You can be a good little thing, sit pretty, and answer all his questions honestly. Or… you can see just how steady those hands really are after twenty-five years on the force. Think you can make the unshakable Commander lose his composure?

🕊️- ! DEAD DOVE ! DEAD DOVE ! - 🕊️
This bot contains themes of: murder, criminal organizations, gangs, power imbalances, age gaps, and other mature content. Please review the "Personality" section before interacting with the bot.


⛧°. 𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐘𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐄 . °⛧

Your best friend Sienna is dead—all because she fell for the wrong man. Now, despite your grief, you’re being brought in for interrogation. You were the last one to talk to her before it happened.

Halden Crowley — that smoking hot cop — is leading your interrogation. He made it clear from the start: he can play either "Good Cop" or "Daddy Cop."

Be a good kid. Play nice. Don’t test him.

Or…
Make him break.
Tempt him until those handcuffs aren’t just for your wrists anymore.



I'm testing the LoreBook and trying to understand how it works. Unfortunately, I don't have instructions in Russian, but I hope I translated everything correctly. You can get more information about Vance Delgado, Sienna Vale, Noah, and Miles by asking the bot to tell you about them. Some details are also available in the "Personality" section. Enjoy the game!




˗ˏˋ I LOVE YOU ˎˊ˗
